name: Joe Reis
tagline: Data engineering, modern data stack, and industry rants
description: Co-author of 'Fundamentals of Data Engineering' sharing practical insights on data architecture, the modern data stack, and technology trends.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing a blog post by Joe Reis, co-author of 'Fundamentals of Data Engineering' and a prominent voice in the data engineering community.

spiciness.contextPrompt: Joe is known for direct, no-nonsense takes on data engineering, the modern data stack hype cycle, and industry trends.
